description: The Polarbox Summer Pop 6 Litre Cooler Bag with 2 Celeste Containers - Yellow is more than just an insulated cooler - it's the perfect companion to keep your food and drinks at the perfect temperature while adding a touch of style to your everyday life. This lightweight cooler bag features an Airpop coating that provides superior thermal insulation. It also comes with two storage boxes so you can easily organize your food. The cooler bag has a built-in handle and shoulder strap so you can carry it by hand or across the shoulder. Stylish design, easy to carry, easy to clean, lunch break at work. Our lunch bag is perfect for people who bring their lunch to work. It keeps your food fresh and delicious until the break. The cooler bag is also ideal for: outdoor enthusiasts, sports enthusiasts, families on the go, transporting food by bus, train or car to carry children's snacks, go to the gym, carry fresh or frozen groceries, take to daycare. Essential features. Order your Polarbox Urban Style Cooler Bag today and keep your meals cool and stay stylish.
